overall.description: Gameplay footage from Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character traversing a snow-covered ruined rooftop before leaping into a web-swinging sequence through a wintery Manhattan. The camera follows the character's high-speed aerial traversal between skyscrapers during a heavy snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined rooftop with stone monuments and industrial debris

agents.ego_description: running across snow-covered ruined rooftop toward a large red industrial structure

entered.detail: ancient stone pillars and broken architectural ruins covered in snow
massive red metal building with scaffolding and industrial detailing
broken concrete surface with patches of snow and debris

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a desolate, snow-covered rooftop scattered with ancient stone monuments and industrial debris. A massive red structure dominates the center of the roof as the character approaches the edge.

events.description: character leaps off the rooftop and enters freefall toward the city below
character shoots web line and initiates swinging motion

agents.ego_description: leaping from the rooftop into a dive, then shooting a web to begin swinging through the city

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers visible in the distance through falling snow
distinctive tall building with a spire rising above the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character launches into the air from the rooftop, diving toward the snow-covered city below. The camera follows the descent as the city skyline opens up, then the character shoots a web to begin swinging.

agents.ego_description: web-swinging at high altitude between snow-covered skyscrapers with fluid arcing motions

entered.detail: modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and snow on ledges
older brick building with fire escapes and snow-covered roof
city streets below covered in snow with sparse vehicle traffic visible
tall building with distinctive red glowing Avengers A logo on the side

segments.scene_description: The character swings gracefully between towering skyscrapers at high altitude, with snow-covered streets visible far below. The Avengers Tower with its glowing logo appears on the right as the traversal continues through the dense urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street level with park and traffic

events.description: character descends to lower altitude swinging near street level and park area

agents.ego_description: swinging at lower altitude near street level, weaving between buildings and passing over a snow-covered park

entered.detail: park area with snow-covered trees and pathways visible below
stone bridge crossing over a road within the park area
distinctive yellow brick building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The character swings down to street level, passing over a snow-covered park with bare winter trees and a stone bridge. Pedestrians and vehicles are visible on the streets below as the swinging continues through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown financial district with narrow building corridors

events.description: character performs rapid aerial maneuvers through narrow gaps between close buildings

agents.ego_description: high-speed web-swinging through narrow gaps between downtown skyscrapers with quick direction changes

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
classic wooden water tower on top of building roof covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character accelerates through the dense downtown district, swinging rapidly between close-set skyscrapers. Digital billboards and rooftop water towers flash by as the high-speed traversal continues through the narrow urban corridors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a desolate, snow-covered rooftop into a high-speed aerial traversal through a wintery Manhattan. It begins with the character running across a roof scattered with stone monuments and industrial debris toward a massive red structure before launching into a steep dive toward the city below. As the character shoots a web to begin swinging, the scene opens up into a vast urban canyon where the camera tracks a graceful flight between towering skyscrapers and past the glowing logo of the Avengers Tower. The perspective then descends toward street level, gliding over a snow-covered park with bare trees and a stone bridge while pedestrians and vehicles pass below. Finally, the movement accelerates through the dense downtown district, swinging rapidly between close-set skyscrapers as digital billboards and rooftop water towers flash by in the narrow corridors.
